data.name: dumbbell incline shrug
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and let your arms hang straight down with your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, shrug your shoulders up towards your ears as high as possible.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline t-raise
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Lean forward and let your arms hang straight down, perpendicular to the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, forming a 'T' shape with your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline twisted flyes
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest, with your arms extended.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbells, rotate your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement.
Step:5 Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles together at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline two arm extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbells close to your chest.
Step:3 Once you are fully lying down, extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline y-raise
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Lean forward slightly and let your arms hang straight down, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides and up in a Y shape until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell iron cross
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell iron cross - improved variation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, forming a T shape with your body. Perform with improved intensity.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your upper arms close to your sides, with your elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell kickbacks on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell kneeling bicep curl exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Kneel on the floor with an exercise ball in front of you.
Step:2 Place your elbows on top of the exercise ball, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lateral to front raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lunge with bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.

Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lunge with firm
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body. Maintain firm form throughout.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying alternate extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Lower one dumbbell down towards your head, bending at the elbow, while keeping the other arm extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying elbow press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells towards your shoulders by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying extension (across face)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell in an arc behind your head until your forearms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then contract your triceps to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying external shoulder rotation
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side on a flat bench with your upper arm against your side and your elbow bent 90 degrees.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in your hand with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm against your side, slowly rotate your forearm upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: dumbbell lying femoral
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and a dumbbell resting on your lower abdomen.
Step:2 Bend your knees and bring the dumbbell towards your glutes, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying on floor rear delt raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the floor with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms up and out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying one arm deltoid rear
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arm straight down towards the floor, keeping it close to your body.
Step:3 Raise your arm up and back, squeezing your shoulder blade towards your spine.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell lying one arm press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell lying one arm press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back supported and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell down towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell lying one arm pronated triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing down, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell lying one arm rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, hanging towards the floor.
Step:2 Keep your arm straight and lift the dumbbell out to the side, away from your body.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell lying one arm supinated triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, and extend your arm straight up above your shoulder.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell lying pronation
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your chest facing down and your arms extended straight down, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Rotate your palms so they are facing up.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you rotate your palms to face down.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying pronation on floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on the floor with your face down and your arms extended straight out in front of you, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Rotate your palms so they are facing down towards the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, lift the dumbbells off the floor by contracting your forearms.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your forearms are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying pullover on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and roll forward until your upper back is resting on the ball.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying rear delt row
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your back muscles, lift the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying single extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm fully extended above your chest.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbell in a controlled manner towards your forehead, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:3 Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell lying supination
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders by contracting your forearms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying supination on floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your legs extended and your arms by your sides, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Rotate your palms to face up, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, squeezing your forearms.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying supine biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying supine curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells down towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying wide curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell neutral grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell one arm bench fly
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh.
Step:3 Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

data.name: dumbbell one arm bent-over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let the dumbbell hang straight down towards the floor, with your arm fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: dumbbell one arm chest fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward, rolling the ball until your upper back is supported on the ball and your head, neck, and shoulders are off the ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Engage your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm concentration curl (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm extended down towards the floor.
Step:3 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

data.name: dumbbell one arm decline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back pressed against the bench.
Step:3 Extend your arm and push the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, fully extending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm fly on exercise ball improved
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward and roll your body down until your upper back is resting on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Extend your arm with the dumbbell straight up above your chest, palm facing inwards.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell out to the side, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on improved movement.

data.name: dumbbell one arm french press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbow stationary.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your upper arm resting on the pad.
Step:2 Hold the dumbbell with a neutral grip (palms facing your body).
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm hammer press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Place your other hand on your hip for stability.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upwards, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm incline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, resting it on your shoulder.
Step:4 Push the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: dumbbell one arm lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm lateral raise with support
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Place your other hand on a stable surface, such as a bench or wall, for support.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Raise the dumbbell out to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:5 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: dumbbell one arm press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and position it at shoulder height, with your elbow bent and palm facing forward.
Step:3 Slowly press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended, while keeping your core engaged and maintaining balance on the exercise ball.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm prone curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl - macro variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms. Focus on macro movement.

data.name: dumbbell one arm pullover on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with one hand and extend your arm straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arm straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm reverse fly (with support)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing inwards.
Step:3 Lean forward and place your free hand on the bench for support.
Step:4 Keep your arm slightly bent and raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm reverse grip press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm reverse spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by flexing your elbow.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm reverse wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm seated bicep curl on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing up and your arm fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm seated hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:3 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm seated neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on your thigh, allowing your wrist to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your forearm stationary, curl your wrist upward as far as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your wrist back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

data.name: dumbbell one arm shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm shoulder press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and press the dumbbell straight up overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm snatch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell towards the ground, keeping it close to your body.
Step:4 Explosively extend your hips, knees, and ankles, driving the dumbbell upwards in a straight line.
Step:5 As the dumbbell reaches shoulder height, quickly rotate your hand and punch it overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:6 Catch the dumbbell overhead with a slight bend in your knees and hips.
Step:7 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm standing curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm standing hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell one arm triceps extension (on bench)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and place your other hand on the bench for support.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your upper arm close to your head and your elbow pointing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbow, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:5 Extend your arm back up to the starting position, fully straightening your elbow.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one arm upright row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palm facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell one arm wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh.
Step:3 Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

data.name: dumbbell one arm zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

data.name: dumbbell over bench neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell over bench one arm neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm extended over the bench, palm facing up.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, keeping your wrist in a neutral position.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell over bench one arm reverse wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell over bench one arm wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell over bench one arm wrist curl - strength variation
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearm on the bench with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrist upwards, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Maintain strength form throughout.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: dumbbell over bench revers wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell over bench wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell palm rotational bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Let your arms hang straight down, palms facing your body.
Step:4 Engage your core and pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 As you pull the dumbbells up, rotate your palms so they face away from your body.
Step:6 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your palms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell palms in incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the backrest and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing inwards.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells slowly towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell peacher hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell plyo squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explode upward, jumping off the ground.
Step:4 While in the air, quickly switch the position of your feet, landing with your opposite foot forward.
Step:5 Immediately lower your body back into a squat position and repeat the jump, switching your feet again.
Step:6 Continue alternating the position of your feet with each jump for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell preacher curl over exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your elbow on the exercise ball.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

data.name: dumbbell press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and dumbbells in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball until your lower back is supported on the ball and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell pronate-grip triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell prone incline curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell prone incline hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight above your chest.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head until you feel a stretch in your chest and shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell pullover hip extension on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and the dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the exercise ball down your back until your head, neck, and upper back are supported on the ball.
Step:3 Hold the dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight and maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 While keeping your arms extended, lift your hips off the ground, squeezing your glutes and engaging your core.
Step:7 Lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell pullover on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold a dumbbell with both hands above your chest, arms extended.
Step:2 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head while keeping your arms straight.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell push press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead.
Step:3 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
